                def build_salary_bands(employees)
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            

                  # Fetch in Ruby — small enough for a company scope
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            
              10
            

            

                  salaries = employees.pluck(:gross_salary_cents)
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            
              10
            

            

                  SALARY_BANDS.map do |band|
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            
              100
            

            

                    count = salaries.count { |c| c >= band[:min] && c < band[:max] }
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            
              50
            

            

                    { label: band[:label], count: count }
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            

                  end
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            

                end
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            

            
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                TENURE_BRACKETS = [
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            
              1
            

            

                  { label: '< 1 an',   min: 0,  max: 12 },
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

                  { label: '1 – 3 ans', min: 12, max: 36 },
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

                  { label: '3 – 5 ans', min: 36, max: 60 },

    184. 
            

            

                  { label: '5+ ans',    min: 60, max: Float::INFINITY }

    185. 
            

            

                ].freeze

                def build_tenure_salary(employees)
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            
              10
            

            

                  data = employees.pluck(:start_date, :gross_salary_cents)
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            
              10
            

            

                  today = Date.current
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

            
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            
              10
            

            

                  TENURE_BRACKETS.map do |bracket|
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            
              40
            

            

                    group = data.select do |start_date, _|
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            
              40
            

            

                      months = ((today - start_date) / 30).to_i
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            
              40
            

            

                      months >= bracket[:min] && months < bracket[:max]
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                    end
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            
              50
            

            

                    total_cents = group.sum { |_, cents| cents }
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            
              40
            

            

                    count       = group.size
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            
              40
            

            

                    avg         = count > 0 ? total_cents / count / 100.0 : 0
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            
              40
            

            

                    { label: bracket[:label], count: count, avg_gross: avg }
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

                  end
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

                end
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

              end
          
      203.

            end

                def analyze_team_coverage(requests, start_date, end_date)

      161.

              def load_team_week_summary(week_start)
          
      74. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    74. 
            

            

                days = (0..6).map { |i| week_start + i.days }
          
      75. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    75. 
            

            

                team = @employee.team_members.includes(:weekly_schedule_plans, :leave_requests)
          
      76. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    76. 
            

            

            
          
      77. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    77. 
            

            

                team.map do |member|
          
      78. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    78. 
            

            

                  plan = member.weekly_schedule_plans.find { |p| p.week_start_date == week_start }
          
      79. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    79. 
            

            

                  leaves_this_week = member.leave_requests
          
      80. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    80. 
            

            

                                           .where(status: %w[approved auto_approved])
          
      81. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    81. 
            

            

                                           .where('start_date <= ? AND end_date >= ?', week_start + 6.days, week_start)
          
      82. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    82. 
            

            

            
          
      83. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    83. 
            

            

                  day_statuses = days.map do |day|
          
      84. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    84. 
            

            

                    day_name = day.strftime('%A').downcase
          
      85. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    85. 
            

            

                    on_leave = leaves_this_week.any? { |l| day >= l.start_date && day <= l.end_date }
          
      86. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    86. 
            

            

                    has_schedule = plan&.schedule_pattern&.dig(day_name).present? &&
          
      87. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    87. 
            

            

                                   plan.schedule_pattern[day_name] != 'off'
          
      88.

      89. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    89. 
            

            

                    if on_leave
          
      90. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    90. 
            

            

                      :leave
          
      91. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    91. 
            

            

                    elsif has_schedule

                      :work

    93.

    95. 
            

            

                    end

    96. 
            

            

                  end

              def process_employee(employee, organization, week_start, week_end)
          
      34.

    38.

    39.

                engine          = LeavePolicyEngine.new(employee)

      43. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    43. 
            

            

                overtime_hours  = [total_hours - rtt_threshold, 0].max

    44. 
            

            

                return if overtime_hours.zero?
          
      45. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    45. 
            

            

            
          
      46. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    46. 
            

            

                rtt_days = (overtime_hours / 7.0).round(2)

    47. 
            

            

            
          
      48. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    48.

      50. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    50. 
            

            

                    employee: employee, organization: organization, leave_type: 'RTT'
          
      51. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    51. 
            

            

                  ) { |b| b.balance = 0; b.accrued_this_year = 0; b.used_this_year = 0 }

    52. 
            

            

            
          
      53.

                  # Check if manager has team members
          
      11.

                                  .joins(:employee)

              class Scope

                def initialize(user, scope)

                def resolve
          
      41. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    41. 
            

            

                  if user.hr_or_admin?
          
      42. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    42. 
            

            

                    scope.all
          
      43. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    43. 
            

            

                  elsif user.manager?
          
      44. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    44. 
            

            

                    # Managers see their team's schedules + their own
          
      45. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    45. 
            

            

                    scope.where(employee_id: [user.id] + user.team_members.pluck(:id))
          
      46. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    46. 
            

            

                  else
          
      47. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    47. 
            

            

                    # Employees see only their own
          
      48. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    48. 
            

            

                    scope.where(employee_id: user.id)
          
      49. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    49. 
            

            

                  end
          
      50. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    50.

            # CalendarWebhookNotifier fires a POST webhook whenever a calendar-relevant event
          
      7. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    7. 
            

            

            # occurs (1:1 scheduled or training assigned). The webhook URL and provider are
          
      8. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    8. 
            

            

            # configured per-organization in organization.settings.
          
      9. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    9. 
            

            

            #
          
      10. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    10. 
            

            

            # This is intentionally provider-agnostic: the webhook consumer (e.g. N8n) is
          
      11. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    11. 
            

            

            # responsible for routing to the actual calendar service (Calendly, Google
          
      12. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    12. 
            

            

            # Calendar, Outlook, etc.) based on its own workflow configuration.
          
      13. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    13. 
            

            

            #
          
      14. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    14. 
            

            

            # Payload schema (JSON):

    15. 
            

            

            #   {
          
      16. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    16.

      17. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    17. 
            

            

            #     "organization": { "id", "name" },
          
      18. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    18. 
            

            

            #     "provider":     "n8n" | "calendly" | "google" | "outlook" | null,
          
      19. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    19. 
            

            

            #     "record": {
          
      20. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    20.

      21. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    21.

      22. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    22. 
            

            

            #     }
          
      23. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    23. 
            

            

            #   }
          
      24. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    24. 
            

            

            #
          
      25. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    25. 
            

            

            # The response body is expected to optionally contain:
          
      26. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    26. 
            

            

            #   { "calendar_event_id": "<external-id>" }
          
      27. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    27. 
            

            

            # If present, it will be stored in record.metadata["calendar_event_id"].
          
      28. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    28. 
            

            

            #
          
      29.

                def notify(event_name, record, payload)
          
      38. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    38. 
            

            

                  webhook_url = @organization.settings['calendar_webhook_url'].presence

    41. 
            

            

                  body = {

    44.

                def fire_request(url, body)
          
      60. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    60. 
            

            

                  uri  = URI.parse(url)
          
      61. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    61. 
            

            

                  http = Net::HTTP.new(uri.host, uri.port)
          
      62. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    62. 
            

            

                  http.use_ssl     = (uri.scheme == 'https')
          
      63. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    63. 
            

            

                  http.open_timeout = TIMEOUT_SECONDS
          
      64. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    64. 
            

            

                  http.read_timeout = TIMEOUT_SECONDS
          
      65. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    65. 
            

            

            
          
      66. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    66. 
            

            

                  request = Net::HTTP::Post.new(uri.request_uri)
          
      67. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    67. 
            

            

                  request['Content-Type'] = 'application/json'
          
      68. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    68. 
            

            

                  request.body = body
          
      69. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    69. 
            

            

            
          
      70. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    70. 
            

            

                  http.request(request)
          
      71. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    71. 
            

            

                end
          
      72. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    72. 
            

            

            
          
      73. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    73. 
            

            

                def store_calendar_event_id(record, response)
          
      74. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    74. 
            

            

                  return unless response.is_a?(Net::HTTPSuccess)
          
      75. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    75. 
            

            

            
          
      76. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    76. 
            

            

                  data = JSON.parse(response.body)
          
      77. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    77. 
            

            

                  event_id = data['calendar_event_id'].presence
          
      78. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    78. 
            

            

                  return unless event_id
          
      79. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    79. 
            

            

            
          
      80. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    80. 
            

            

                  record.update_column(:metadata, record.metadata.merge('calendar_event_id' => event_id))
          
      81. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    81. 
            

            

                rescue JSON::ParserError
          
      82. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    82. 
            

            

                  # Webhook responded with non-JSON — that's fine, just ignore
          
      83. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    83. 
            

            

                end
          
      84. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    84. 
            

            

              end

            end

                def build_rows
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33. 
            

            

                  manager.organization.employees.active.order(:last_name, :first_name).map do |emp|
          
      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34. 
            

            

                    tenure_months = ((Date.current - emp.start_date) / 30).to_i
          
      35. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    35. 
            

            

                    gross         = emp.gross_salary_cents / 100.0

                    variable      = emp.variable_pay_cents  / 100.0
          
      37.

                    rate          = emp.employer_charges_rate
          
      38.

                    employer_monthly = (gross + variable) * rate

    39.

    40.

    45.

    46.

      47. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    47.

                      format_date(emp.start_date),

    51.

                def build_rows(employees)

      186.

                def cell_value(emp, col, can_see_salary)
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            
              28
            

            

                  case col
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            
              14
            

            

                  when "name"             then emp.full_name
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            
              10
            

            

                  when "department"       then emp.department
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

                  when "role"             then emp.role
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

                  when "contract_type"    then emp.contract_type
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

                  when "job_title"        then emp.job_title
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            

                  when "start_date"       then emp.start_date&.strftime('%d/%m/%Y')
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            

                  when "tenure_months"    then emp.tenure_in_months
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            
              1
            

            

                  when "leave_days_used"  then leave_days_used(emp)
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            

                  when "leave_type"       then leave_type_for(emp)
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            
              1
            

            

                  when "evaluation_score" then latest_evaluation_score(emp)
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

                  when "evaluation_status" then latest_evaluation_status(emp)
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                  when "onboarding_status"  then emp.employee_onboardings.active.first&.status
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                  when "integration_score"  then emp.employee_onboardings.active.first&.integration_score_cache
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            
              2
            

            

                  when "salary"           then can_see_salary ? format_salary(emp) : "—"
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                  else nil
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            

                  end
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

                end

    235.
